content: {"vocabulary":[{"word":"pomme","translation":"Apfel","pronunciation":"pɔm","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Je mange une pomme.","exampleTranslation":"Ich esse einen Apfel.","usageNote":"Ein Apfel ist ein rundes, meist rotes oder grünes Obst."},{"word":"pain","translation":"Brot","pronunciation":"pɛ̃","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le pain est bon.","exampleTranslation":"Das Brot ist gut.","usageNote":"Schwarzbrot oder Weißbrot sind verschiedene Arten von Brot."},{"word":"eau","translation":"Wasser","pronunciation":"o","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Je bois de l'eau.","exampleTranslation":"Ich trinke Wasser.","usageNote":"Wasser ist wichtig zum Trinken."},{"word":"lait","translation":"Milch","pronunciation":"lɛ","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le lait est blanc.","exampleTranslation":"Die Milch ist weiß.","usageNote":"Milch kommt von Kühen."},{"word":"fromage","translation":"Käse","pronunciation":"fʁɔmaʒ","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"J'ai du fromage.","exampleTranslation":"Ich habe Käse.","usageNote":"Käse gibt es in vielen Sorten, wie Gouda oder Mozzarella."},{"word":"œuf","translation":"Ei","pronunciation":"œf","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Un œuf est rond.","exampleTranslation":"Ein Ei ist rund.","usageNote":"Eier werden oft zum Frühstück gegessen."},{"word":"banane","translation":"Banane","pronunciation":"ba.naːn","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"La banane est jaune.","exampleTranslation":"Die Banane ist gelb.","usageNote":"Eine Banane hat eine lange Schale."},{"word":"jus","translation":"Saft","pronunciation":"zys","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Je bois du jus de fruits.","exampleTranslation":"Ich trinke Fruchtsaft.","usageNote":"Saft ist ein Getränk aus Obst."},{"word":"chocolat","translation":"Schokolade","pronunciation":"ʃɔkɔlɑ","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"J'aime le chocolat.","exampleTranslation":"Ich mag Schokolade.","usageNote":"Schokolade ist süß und schwarz oder weiß."},{"word":"riz","translation":"Reis","pronunciation":"ʁi","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le riz est blanc.","exampleTranslation":"Der Reis ist weiß.","usageNote":"Reis wird oft mit Fleisch gegessen."},{"word":"pâtes","translation":"Nudeln","pronunciation":"paːt","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Les pâtes sont bonnes.","exampleTranslation":"Die Nudeln sind gut.","usageNote":"Nudeln werden mit Tomatensauce gegessen."},{"word":"viande","translation":"Fleisch","pronunciation":"vɛ̃d","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Je mange de la viande.","exampleTranslation":"Ich esse Fleisch.","usageNote":"Fleisch kann Rind, Huhn oder Schwein sein."},{"word":"légume","translation":"Gemüse","pronunciation":"leɡyːm","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Les légumes sont sains.","exampleTranslation":"Das Gemüse ist gesund.","usageNote":"Gemüse wie Karotten oder Erbsen wird gegessen."},{"word":"fruit","translation":"Obst","pronunciation":"fʁyːt","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le fruit est sucré.","exampleTranslation":"Das Obst ist süß.","usageNote":"Obst wie Erdbeeren oder Äpfel ist gesund."},{"word":"soupe","translation":"Suppe","pronunciation":"suːp","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"La soupe est chaude.","exampleTranslation":"Die Suppe ist heiß.","usageNote":"Suppe wird oft zum Mittagessen gegessen."}]}
